site.title: Valeris Coaching
site.description: Technology leadership consulting in Geneva. AI governance, engineering team performance and technical executive coaching for Swiss enterprises.

descriptions.home: Technology leadership consulting in Geneva. AI governance, engineering team performance and technical executive coaching for Swiss enterprises.
descriptions.services: Three advisory offerings for Swiss technology leaders: AI governance and ISO 42001, engineering team performance, CTO and VP Engineering coaching.
descriptions.aiGovernance: AI maturity diagnostic, governance framework aligned with ISO 42001 and EU AI Act, data sovereignty and AI FinOps. For Swiss CTOs and CISOs.
descriptions.teamPerformance: Embedded technical coaching, TDD/BDD, CI/CD, code reviews. The Coach-Craft method to transform your engineering team performance in 12 weeks.
descriptions.executiveCoaching: Individual coaching for CTOs, VPs Engineering and technical directors. Vantaset programme, first 100 days, board alignment. Geneva and French-speaking Switzerland.
descriptions.blog: Articles and podcasts on technology leadership, artificial intelligence and organisational transformation. By Lucas Challamel, consultant in Geneva.
descriptions.publications: White papers and resources on AI governance, digital sovereignty and technology leadership for Swiss enterprises.
descriptions.partners: Technology and strategic partners: Microsoft, Anthropic, AWS, Cloudflare. Consulting alliances and ISO 42001, TOGAF certifications.
descriptions.about: Lucas Challamel, 30 years of technology leadership. France, Australia, Switzerland. Former NAB/UBank, Azqore, UBP. Trilingual, tricultural. Based in Geneva.
descriptions.contact: Book a 30-minute conversation with Lucas Challamel. Technology leadership consulting, AI governance and executive coaching. Geneva, Switzerland.
descriptions.legal: Legal notice, privacy policy (nDSG and GDPR) and terms of use for valeris.fr. Valeris Coaching, Geneva.

blog.subtitle: Thoughts on technology leadership, AI, and organisational transformation.

aiGovernance.tagline: From AI curiosity to AI confidence - responsible adoption that actually ships.

executiveCoaching.tagline: The role changed. Your playbook should too.

hero.headline: Technology leadership that delivers.
hero.subheadline: I help Swiss enterprises get technology transformation right - not just the strategy, but the execution.

contact.title: Contact
contact.expectation: A 30-minute conversation, not a sales pitch. We will discuss your situation and I will tell you honestly whether I can help.
